problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus may resolve What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
